title: senecio sagittatus var. pubescens
intro: Senecio sagittatus var. pubescens, also known as woolly Jacob's ladder, is a variety of the Senecio sagittatus plant, a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The woolly Jacob's ladder plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and the need for proper dosing.
